## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss content strategy, performance, and technical improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [30 articles published this month, with 12 more planned for next week](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [U.S. leads have decreased significantly in June (3) compared to previous months (12)](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Team to explore adding more free trial CTAs in blog posts alongside demo CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [Plans to start Spanish translations of top-performing blog posts to test impact](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Technical SEO improvements needed, particularly around sitemap issues due to WordPress-Webflow transition](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [30 articles published this month, 12 more planned for next week](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Clicks and impressions improving month-over-month (25 million impressions in June)](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [HubSpot data: 34 total leads, 3 U.S. leads (down from previous months)](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Focus on beauty segment and executive-focused content for upcoming articles](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Team to share proposed topics in Slack for approval before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)

### Lead Generation Concerns

  - [Significant decrease in U.S. leads for June (3) compared to previous months (12)](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Team to investigate reasons behind the drop in U.S. leads](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Discussion on hierarchy of conversions: demos \> free trials \> other (e.g., playbook downloads, webinars)](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)

### CTA Optimization

  - [Current focus on "Book a Demo" CTAs throughout the site](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Proposal to test adding more "Free Trial" CTAs in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [Team to explore A/B testing options within CMS limitations](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [Cameron to develop new CMS setting for blog sidebar CTAs to facilitate testing](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)

### Content Improvements

  - [Suggestion to add more images and videos to blog posts to improve readability and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Consider adding GIFs and visual elements to break up text-heavy content](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)

### Translation Strategy

  - [Proposal to start with Spanish translations of top-performing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Plan to use native speakers for review and quality assurance](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Cameron to manually translate top 20 blogs using built-in tools to assess traffic impact](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Team to evaluate results before committing to additional translation costs](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)

### Technical SEO Improvements

  - [Ongoing issues with sitemap due to WordPress-Webflow transition](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Need to complete migration to Webflow for improved indexing and site architecture](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
  - [Team to focus on technical SEO alongside content-driven SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share HubSpot data with Megan earlier in the week for more in-depth analysis](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Post proposed 12 stories for next week in Slack for approval](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Investigate reasons behind the drop in U.S. leads](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Cameron to develop new CMS setting for blog sidebar CTAs to test free trial vs. demo CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Add more visual elements (images, videos, GIFs) to blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Cameron to manually translate top 20 performing blogs into Spanish and monitor traffic impact](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Schedule brainstorming session to discuss SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Continue efforts to complete WordPress to Webflow migration for improved technical SEO](https://fathom.video/share/y3Bc_SqUgagmS7UMJ5FmGo8pWJKD8ycm?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
